testcase.name: A room member can upload and download a file

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.error:
Failing step: And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.027s Location: features/file_transfer.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_handshake.py", line 66, in handshake status, resp = _get_resp_headers(sock) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_handshake.py", line 158, in _get_resp_headers raise WebSocketBadStatusException( ...<5 lines>... ) websocket._exceptions.WebSocketBadStatusException: Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b'\r\nNot Found\r\n\r\n

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

\r\n
Cannot open document for: /room
\r\n\r\n\r\n'
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: A room member can upload and download a file Given a unique room alias "files_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.027s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s And client "alice" joins room "files_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" joins room "files_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s When user "alice" uploads file "notes.txt" to room "files_room" with content ... skipped in 0.000s """ encrypted payload bytes """ Then the last HTTP response should have status 200 ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" should receive a "FileUploaded" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | file_name | notes.txt | | user_uuid | alice | | poster | false | When the file "notes.txt" is downloaded from room "files_room" ... skipped in 0.000s Then the downloaded content should equal ... skipped in 0.000s """ encrypted payload bytes """
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: A non-member cannot upload into an existing room

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: A non-member cannot upload into an existing room Given a unique room alias "restricted_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.004s And client "alice" joins room "restricted_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s When user "mallory" uploads file "blocked.txt" to room "restricted_room" with content ... skipped in 0.000s """ blocked bytes """ Then the last HTTP response should have status 403 ... skipped in 0.000s And the last HTTP response body should contain "User is not a member of the specified room" ... skipped in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
